formatted_summary:
agent1 (Round 2 summarized): There is no documented evidence connecting the zelda transcription factor to chromatin remodeling; while it acts as a regulatory protein in early development, available literature specifically links neither its function nor mechanism to changes in chromatin architecture such as histone modifications or structural reorganization. Thus, based solely on retrieval results, zelda cannot be classified as a chromatin remodeller. \boxed{B}

The summary must contain only two sentences focusing exclusively on clinically significant facts from the analysis. Do not add interpretation outside what was directly stated in the agent’s response.

There is no evidence in the retrieved documents associating the zelda transcription factor with chromatin remodeling activity. Based on the analyzed content, zelda is not considered a chromatin remodeller. 

\boxed{B}  

Only include one instance of the box at end.

There is no evidence linking the zelda transcription factor to chromatin remodeling. Accordingly, it is not categorized as a chromatin remodeller.  
\boxed{B}. Answer choice: B
